The school's average HSC course mark replicated our Statistically Similar School Group (SSSG) of below that State average course mark of trialing of a Head Teacher Senior Studies position; the development of Senior Individual Education Plans and ran targeted senior student workshops, based on curriculum and study skills, in response to identified student learning support needs. All faculties recognise that increased student achievement at the HSC is built upon the foundations of targeted skills development in the junior school.
